title: hieracium bifidum subsp. subdurifrons
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. subdurifrons, also known as Hieracium subdurifrons, is a subspecies of the Hieracium bifidum plant, a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb with a long history of use in traditional medicine, particularly in Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Hieracium bifidum subsp. subdurifrons include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall health and well-being.
